transcript.text:
(Today's 5-star restaurant..) They have more than 2,000 reviews
(Today's 5-star restaurant..) and the rating is unbelievably high as well!
(Bunsik heaven 'Kimbap Nara'!!)
(The restaurant with the most reviews)
(What about the taste...?) Everything is so delicious here!
(The best 'Kimbap Nara')
Kimbap is huge!!!
(The biggest kimbap ever) It's bigger than my arm
(And look who's here to explore..)
('Kimbap Nara' today)
(The biggest eater in town is here to check out 'Kimbap Nara'!!)
(On a rainy day in spring...)
Hello everyone
I'm near the Namseong station right now
(The famous restaurant in town!) I heard this 'Kimbab Nara' is very famous so here I am
This place is known as the most famous in this neighborhood

('Kimbap Nara Namseong Station') They have more than 2,000 reviews
(Look at all the stars..!) and the rating is unbelievably high as well!
('Kimbap Nara' located in Dongjak-gu, Seoul)
(Flustered by so many options already..) What should I have?
(Flustered by so many options already..) There are so many options here, I can't decide
(Entering 'Kimbap Nara') Hello
(Overwhelmed by the options)
Wow, there are so many options here...
I can't choose
whenever I come to a place like this
(But you always do..) I just feel like I want to eat everything here
The dish I always eat here is
tuna kimchi-jjigae!
I also have to eat donkatsu
(It's a must..) Bibimbap sounds good as well
I should have ramyun as well!

(Let's just eat them all...) Jjolmyeon...! I like naengmyeon here as well..
- Excuse me! - Yes
Can I get one beef kimbap,
tuna kimbap,
tuna kimchi-jjigae,
cheese donkatsu,
cheese ramyun,
kimchi sujebi,
- and stone-pot bibimbap as well? - Okay
(Order complete) 7 in total!
(Why 7?)
Really..?
Are you sure she can eat them all..?
(Hahaha)
It's 3:46 PM
right now

Usually, it's time when there aren't many customers
(Crowded) but there are so many customers
(It proves that the restaurant is popular..!) It must be a great restaurant!
(Already a full house at 3 PM)
- It's always busy here - The food is so delicious!
The chef is amazing..!
I just heard another customer praising this restaurant
Let's see how good it is
(Let's take a close look at 'Kimbap Nara') What?! Even the soup is so delicious!
(What is the average size of kimbap you can think of..?)
(It'll be bigger than what you'd expect..)
(Beef kimbap) (Tuna kimbap)
(Cheese donkatsu)
(Stone pot bibimbap)
(Kimchi sujebi) (Cheese ramyun)
(Tuna kimchi-jjigae as well!)

('Kimbap Nara' is here!) Kimbap is huge!
Thank you!
Thank you
(All the dishes are here now!) Nice! But
what is this?
It's thicker than my wrist
(It's thicker than her arm..) It's bigger than my arm
Bon appétit
I'll start with kimbap & ramyun first
(Tzuyang's favorite cheese ramyun..!) Cheese ramyun is my favorite
I'm so excited!
This is exactly what I wanted!
(I love ramyun) Ramyun is a must!
Tuna kimbap first
(Unrealistic size..) Look at this size..
(Huge) The kimbap is huge!

It has a whole rolled omelet inside, haha
Dipping it in like this
Oh, the egg is so soft, it's delicious!
The fried egg is..
(Totally different from regular ones..!) soft like a steamed egg
Beef kimbap
Wow
(It's huge as well..) This is unbelievable!
Eating it with the soup like this..!
(I missed you, 'Kimbap Nara'..!) I wanted to come to a place like this for a long time!
(Great value for money..!) This is super cheap for the size!
(Still amazed by the size) I can't believe how big this is
(It's hard to fit in the mouth, haha)
Beef kimbap is so good as well!
Even the beef isn't those cheap ones either
It's real minced beef!

Since they don't sell drinks here,
we got it from outside upon permission!
The next is kimchi-jjigae!
(Look at the ingredients!) Wow, a lot of ingredients...
(Full of ingredients)
I think I know why this place is popular, the portions are generous
(Tuna kimchi-jjigae and bibimbap collaboration!) Shall I have it with bibimbap?
(The stone pot bibimbap sounds delicious too!)
It's scorched rice
They heated it up for me again
so I think the rice is more scorched
(One bite of hot stone pot bibimbap, one bite of tuna kimchi jjigae, and repeat)
There's rice cake too
I think it'll taste good with kimbap too
(Tuna kimbap in tuna kimchi-jjigae) Since it's tuna kimchi-jjigae!
Enoki mushrooms!

There's a lot of enoki mushrooms in here
(This looks so yummy..)
Wow, this kimbap
must be twice as big as regular ones
(It won't fit!)
(Not an easy bite..) This is so hard!
I usually eat kimbap vertically
(But she's a master of it..)
(Koreans are all about kimchi!) It'll be good with kimchi too
This feels like...
I'm eating homemade food in a hurry
It's delicious
but I think it's because it's inexpensive
(Even the size of the earthen pot is different...) I've never seen such a big earthen pot...
I think I know what this pot is used for
(Samgyetang earthen pot!!)

(Cleared the tuna kimchi-jjigae)
(Cleared the stone pot bibimbap)
(Beef kimbap)
It's as big as my fist
Next, donkatsu!
(It's me, clumsy Tzuyang..) No, no!
(Moving the kimchi sujebi closer!)
The cheese must be hard now
(Cheese is never die)
It's still stretching a bit
(Finished cutting the cheese donkatsu!) Ah, bon appétit
It's delicious!
You gotta have donkatsu at 'Kimbap Nara'
Delicious!
(Kimchi sujebi) This must be 2 servings
(This is 1 serving?) So much..! Wow

I was craving this sujebi since a few days ago
(You didn't forget about filming, did you?)
(When did you eat this much..?)
(It's torture to watch this today...)
Wow, the kimbap here
is no joke, looks so good
The egg garnish is delicious
The bowl is still full
(The highlight of kimbap) The end part! Wow...
What...?
(Are you a giant yubu-chobap..?) This is amazing!
(It's not going in)
(Tzuyang WON)
Why is the kimbap so big today?
It's too big!!
(Full house..!) It's always busy here despite the time...

(Huh?)
(Why are you laughing suddenly?)
I just took a look around
Everyone here
(Full cheeks) is like this
Everyone
is chewing like this
I think one kimbap is more than one ramyun!
(So many reviews..!!) There are 2,116 reviews!
Wow, I've never seen a 'Kimbap Nara' with this many reviews!
I have to eat quick because so many customers are waiting!
(The last end part!)
If it's this big,
you can charge
the full price for only this piece!
(Big bite)

(It takes a long time to finish one whole kimbap...)
(She's eating so well..)
She's like a celebrity!!
She's so pretty
(Miss Pretty who eats very well)
- Is it delicious? - Absolutely!!
If we knew she was gonna eat that much,
we could've given her less, haha
(Then she might've ordered more.. Haha)
(Another class 'Kimbap Nara' CLEAR!)
They have so many reviews
and an amazing rating so I came to check it out
and apparently, customers keep coming non-stop!
(Everything including price and taste) The serving size is unbelievable
(was perfect at 'Kimbap Nara'!) and I think that's why it's so popular!
I had a great meal today as well!
